name: Max Cash Corporate
description_short: Max Cash connects borrowers to personal, installment, and title loans up to $10,000+ with same-day or fast funding. Partners with multiple lenders to match applicants across credit profiles.
description_long:
Max Cash® operates as a loan marketplace and lead generation platform that connects consumers to a network of lending partners offering personal loans, installment loans, and title loans. The company positions itself as a "one-stop shop" for financial products, emphasizing speed and accessibility regardless of credit score.

The platform offers loan amounts ranging from $250 to $10,000+, with stated processing in minutes. Applicants complete a multi-step inquiry form that collects personal, financial, and vehicle information (for title loan qualification). Max Cash explicitly markets to consumers with low to very low credit scores and offers optional credit improvement services through partner companies. The application process includes income verification, employment details, bank account information, and optional vehicle collateral assessment.

Max Cash distinguishes itself through its multi-lender network model, allowing applicants to potentially receive multiple offers from up to six different lending partners. The platform emphasizes data encryption, CCPA compliance, and SSL security. The company also offers an opt-in credit-building partner service alongside loan matching. Notably, all applicants consent to marketing communications from TMG (Tradition Media Group LLC) and partner lenders via phone, SMS, and email, even on Do-Not-Call lists.

While Max Cash provides speed and accessibility, prospective borrowers should note that this is a lead generation platform rather than a direct lender. Actual loan terms, APRs, and fees are determined by partner lenders and are not disclosed on Max Cash's site. The mandatory data collection and opt-in marketing consent are significant considerations. Borrowers with fair-to-good credit may find better rates elsewhere; this platform's strength is serving borrowers with limited options.
address: 4835 E Cactus Rd Suite 430, Scottsdale, AZ 85254

company_info.headquarters: 4835 E Cactus Rd Suite 430, Scottsdale, AZ 85254

pros: Fast processing: advertises loan decisions "in minutes" with same-day or next-day funding potential
No direct lender restrictions: connects to multiple partner lenders, increasing approval odds across credit profiles
Low credit score acceptance: explicitly serves borrowers with low to very low credit scores
Flexible loan types: offers personal loans, installment loans, and title loans from one platform
Wide loan range: amounts from $250 to $10,000+, serving various financial needs
Optional credit improvement service: offers referral to credit-building partner for eligible borrowers
Data security certifications: displays SSL encryption, CCPA compliance, and data protection policies
cons: Lead generation platform, not direct lender: actual loan terms, APRs, and fees set by partner lenders and not pre-disclosed
Mandatory marketing consent: applicants must agree to receive calls, SMS, and emails from up to six partners and TMG, even if on Do-Not-Call lists
Invasive data collection: requires SSN, driver's license, bank account numbers, and routing numbers upfront
Unclear partner vetting: no disclosure of which lenders are partners or their typical APR ranges
Vehicle collateral requested: title loan option may pressure borrowers with bad credit into collateral-based lending at unfavorable rates
best_for: Borrowers with low or very low credit scores who struggle to qualify for traditional personal loans
Consumers needing small loans ($250-$1,000) quickly and willing to compare multiple lender offers
Vehicle owners considering title loans as an alternative to payday loans or installment lending
Applicants open to credit-building services and willing to accept partner marketing communications
diagnosis: Max Cash is best for borrowers with limited credit options who need quick access to small or medium-sized loans ($250-$10,000+) and are willing to engage with multiple lenders simultaneously. The main caveat is that this is a lead aggregator, not a lender—actual terms and APRs are unknown until partner contact, and applicants must consent to ongoing marketing calls and SMS from multiple third parties.
services: Personal loan marketplace and application platform
Installment loan matching and inquiry submission
Title loan inquiries and vehicle collateral assessment
Multi-lender loan offer comparison (up to six partners)
Credit improvement service referral and enrollment
Bank account verification for direct deposit
Financial profile assessment and partner matching
Marketing consent and partner communication coordination
